creator: 9x5j7h+59gig3r0d4blo@grr.la
text:
Overview: 

The LM-Server does't find any squeezeboxes in the lan. The standalone squeezeboxes don't find the server, either.

Steps to Reproduce:
1) Open Server ui [ip:9000]

2) view the "select play" selection-field in the top right corner of the interface. "No players found"--

Actual Results: Playing via standalone squeezebox not possible.

Expected Results: The Player (client) should have been available (discovered automatically) and should be able to play music.

Build Date & Hardware: 

Build 2018-01-31 on FreeBSD 11.1 (FreeNAS11.1U1) IOCAGE

Additional Information: -
